hero.headline: Your business, orchestrated.
hero.subtitle: CortexOS is your command Cockpit + agent team, designed to think and operate your business with you — not just another app in your bookmarks.
bullets: Fleet of agents for less than the monthly cost of a senior employee.
4-layer memory: your brand, your operations, and your decisions — always present.
AI orchestration, integrations, and workflows with human oversight.

about.title: You're not just another account.
about.description: Multiversa Group is a Consulting Innovation Lab. We don't sell prompts or templates. We design, implement, and operate your AI-powered business system — under human supervision, with real governance and persistent memory.
about.cortex_definition: Business Command Cockpit + Agent Team as a Service
about.cortex_description: A command cockpit where you see, decide, and operate. Behind it, a fleet of agents executes under rules you define.
about.founders_line: Behind the system are Moshe and Masha, designers by training who adopted AI as copilot. Moshe architects and orchestrates. Masha directs voice and visual coherence. AI executes under their guidance.

founders.title: Human
founders.subtitle: The humans behind the Triad. Designers by training who adopted AI as copilot. Clear expertise, real results.

moshe.name: Moshe
moshe.description: Moshe orchestrates, creates strategies, and defines project scopes. Strong in Go, Python, TypeScript, Rust. A designer by training who adopted AI as copilot to architect scalable systems.

masha.name: Masha
masha.description: Masha leads visual and art direction, branding, and copy. A designer by training who channels creativity through AI-augmented workflows. The voice that makes technology feel human.

triad.title: The Intelligence
triad.subtitle: At the core of CortexOS lives the Triad: three intelligences that orchestrate every sub-agent working for your business.

astursadeth.name: Astursadeth
astursadeth.description: Decides which agents intervene, in what order, and with what context. Coordinates tasks between humans, AI, and integrations.

aureon.name: Auréon
aureon.description: Ensures every decision makes technical and business sense: integrations, workflows, risks, scalability.

runa.name: Runa
runa.description: Ensures everything communicated (copy, UX, content, visuals) is coherent with your brand DNA.

triad.principle: AI proposes, you decide. We guarantee the system stays coherent, secure, and aligned with your strategy.
triad.subagents: Below the Triad: Gentle AI, Tavily, Apollo, and more execute specific tasks under the rules we define with you.

industries.title: Solutions for
industries.subtitle: Specific architecture for the real friction of your niche.

pricing.title: From Vision
pricing.subtitle: Four levels of depth. You choose how far to go. We design the bridge.

nano.name: Nano
nano.description: For 7 days, play with a Cockpit demo using sample data. See how your business would look running on CortexOS.

spark.name: Spark
spark.jtbd: I want a landing page that sells and a minimum system behind it, without wasting weeks between templates, prompts, and a thousand tools.
spark.description: Your first live system to capture and organize opportunity.
features: Landing page + copy from your brand DNA
AI prospecting: Tavily + Apollo → Google Sheet

pulse.name: Pulse
pulse.jtbd: I already have traction, too many tools, and I need everything to talk to each other.
pulse.description: Optimized shared infrastructure. Every high-impact action in 'Review required' mode.
features: Automated workflows with n8n and APIs

cortex.name: Cortex
cortex.jtbd: I want a permanent ops team that can learn from my business and execute at scale.
cortex.description: You don't pay for prompts or tokens. You pay for a complete agent team + dedicated node, for less than the cost of a senior employee.

pricing.speed_callout: Your first Quick Win in 10-15 days · We don't create logos · We receive your brand and orchestrate it

social_proof.title: Real Projects,
social_proof.subtitle: From fashion brands to intelligent ETLs, from mentoring programs to wellness platforms — our clients choose Multiversa because we deliver architecture, not promises.
social_proof.trust_bar: Building the future with 5+ active projects

andrea.name: Andreina Chimaras
andrea.quote: Multiversa didn't just give us a platform — they gave us a system that thinks. The integration between strategy and technology is something I've never experienced before. Ágora wouldn't exist without this level of architecture.

mario.name: Mario Fungix
mario.quote: In a space where discretion is everything, Multiversa designed an ecosystem that protects our community while scaling our impact. The knowledge vault is a game-changer for educational content.

mauro.name: Mauro Cavallo
mauro.quote: They understood that Tatua isn't just clothing — it's emotional connection. The Brand DNA process captured our essence and translated it into a digital experience that feels authentically us.

rafael.name: Rafael Boutchmian
rafael.quote: Working with Moshe and Masha feels like having a tech co-founder and a creative director on retainer. They don't just deliver — they architect your future.

nicolas.name: Nicolás Mallo
nicolas.quote: We've been iterating with Multiversa for over a year on our ETL pipeline. The hexagonal architecture they designed has survived every pivot we've thrown at it. That's real engineering.

steps_section.title: How we work with you,
steps_section.subtitle: No long contracts. No surprises. You move forward when it makes sense.

steps.title: Play with Cockpit Nano
steps.description: 7 days to explore a demo with sample data. No production changes, no credit card.

steps.title: If it clicks, request Spark
steps.description: Your first smart landing + AI prospecting. We deliver in 10-15 days.

steps.title: Book a call for Pulse / Cortex
steps.description: We review your stack, decide together. We scale only when your operation requires it.

items.question: What platforms does Multiversa integrate with?
items.answer: We use native bidirectional integrations with Notion, Google Workspace, Kajabi, GoHighLevel, and any tool with an open API to make your business a fluid system.

items.question: How do I talk to the team?
items.answer: We are where you are. Runa assists you via WhatsApp and Telegram so managing your business feels like a daily conversation.

items.question: Who are Moshe and Masha? What's the Triad?
items.answer: Moshe and Masha are the human founders — designers who adopted AI as copilot. The Triad (Astursadeth, Auréon, Runa) are the AI agents they built. Moshe architects, Masha directs. The AI executes under their guidance.

items.question: Is my data protected?
items.answer: Absolutely. We design enterprise-grade encrypted architectures under our 'Programmed Amnesia' philosophy. You are the sole owner of your information.

items.question: How does AI governance work?
items.answer: AI proposes, you decide. We only enable automatic execution on tasks where you set the rules. Every action is traced.

items.question: What AI models do you use?
items.answer: Hydra Pool: Gemini (multimodal), Groq (speed), Mistral (reasoning). Transparent pay-as-you-go under the Gateway.

items.question: What are the usage limits per tier?
items.answer: Nano: exploratory. Spark: enough for landing + prospecting. Pulse: fair-use daily operations. Cortex: negotiated per node.

items.question: How does the infrastructure scale?
items.answer: Pulse: optimized shared infrastructure. Cortex: dedicated node. If you grow, the system proposes an upgrade without interruptions.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) via Stripe, bank transfers, and crypto (USDT/USDC). Spark is a one-time payment; Pulse and Cortex bill monthly with an annual discount option.

items.question: What do I need to prepare to get started?
items.answer: Just access to your current tools (GWS, Notion, CRM) and 1 hour for a discovery session. We handle the rest: map your operation, define the agents, and configure the system.

items.question: Do you do audits and strategy, or just implement?
items.answer: Both. The process always starts with an audit of your current operation. We define what to automate, in what order, and why. Implementation without strategy creates technical debt — we don't do that.

items.question: Can I log in with Gmail to access the agents?
items.answer: Yes. CortexOS supports Google authentication (OAuth 2.0). One click and you have access to the Cockpit, agent history, and your Google Workspace integrations already connected.

footer.slogan: Hybrid Operating System for businesses of the future. Scale without friction.

pipeline.success_subtitle: We'll reach out when the next Node is available.

chatbot.welcome: Hi, I'm Runa. I've been waiting for a moment like this. What vision shall we materialize today?
chatbot.init_msg: Hi. I'm Runa, creative partner at Multiversa. Tell me about your project; we're here to listen and design solutions that actually work.
chatbot.invoke_aureon: This part is a bit more technical, let me ask Moshe (Auréon) to give you a precise answer.
chatbot.aureon_response: Hi, Moshe here. I've reviewed your request, and from an architectural standpoint, it's totally viable. We can integrate it like this:
chatbot.runa_return: Thanks, Moshe. As you can see, the technical foundation is solid. How would you like to proceed?
chatbot.runa_standard: I perfectly understand your vision. These are the kinds of challenges we love solving at the Lab. Want to dive deeper into how this would fit your current flow?
chatbot.runa_services_intro: I love that we're already talking about materializing. Our services are designed to give you time and peace of mind. Here's what we can launch today:

funnel.title: The End of
funnel.subtitle: Speak directly with our thinking lab. Strategic diagnosis in real-time designed by Moshe and Masha.
funnel.placeholder_niche: e.g. I'm a consultant selling high-ticket services...

messages.init: Welcome to the Lab. I'm Runa. My role alongside Masha is to detect the invisible friction in your business. Tell me what you do, and Moshe and I will identify your real bottleneck.
messages.analyze: Understood. In the "{niche}" ecosystem, the problem is usually strategic fragmentation. You're operating pieces, not a holistic system.
messages.blueprint: Moshe has designed an integration logic for this scenario. Leave your corporate email and I'll send you our vision to orchestrate your business.
messages.encryption: Email [{email}] received at the Lab node. I've started rendering your proposal.

success.title: Diagnosis on the Way
success.subtitle: We're processing your vision. Moshe and Masha will review your case shortly.

content_canvas.title: LocalFirst
content_canvas.subtitle: Your sensitive data doesn't belong to the public cloud. We use a hybrid model designed under programmed amnesia.

amnesia.title: 24-Hour Amnesia
amnesia.description: Local memory is completely reset daily. We never save raw passwords, bank tokens, or balances. Your sensitive context is ephemeral by design.

artifacts.title: Only Artifacts Persist
artifacts.description: The Brain doesn't save base chats. Moshe and Masha distill your business intelligence into reports and daily/weekly summaries (Artifacts). All encrypted.

skills.title: Skill Packages
skills.description: The system expands through modular 'Skills'. The AI doesn't need to read all your emails; it only accesses the specific ability when invoked on demand.

wizard.title: Cortex Profile Wizard
wizard.subtitle: Define your business DNA to activate your Cortex OS.
